title: hieracium albulanum
intro: Hieracium albulanum, also known as Mountain Hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The medicinal properties of Hieracium albulanum have been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to make herbal preparations for its medicinal and therapeutic uses.
